zh.lifeSummary: 當Lemuel Drew於1769年出生在美國緬因州約克利明頓時，他的父親Samuel Drew31歲，母親Lovey Bunker31歲。他於1798年8月21日與Nancy Chadwell在美國緬因州約克利默里克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1840年9月4日在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可劍橋大學默里 利默里克享年71歲，埋葬在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可劍橋大學默里 利默里克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lemuel Drew于1769年出生在美国缅因州約克利明頓时，他的父亲Samuel Drew31岁，母亲Lovey Bunker31岁。他于1798年8月21日与Nancy Chadwell在美国缅因州約克利默里克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1840年9月4日在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可劍橋大學默里 利默里克享年71岁，埋葬在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可劍橋大學默里 利默里克。

nameMeanings.name: Drew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from a Norman French personal name Dreus based on ancient Germanic Drogo, the name of one of the sons of Charlemagne (compare Gothic driugan ‘to serve as a soldier’). In Old French this name became Dreus, Drues (nominative) and Dru, Driu, Dreu (accusative) and was introduced to England by the Normans. For further information about this name, see also Montague .
English: from the personal name Drew, a pet form of Andrew which was confused with the same name of Old French origin (see 1 above).

Irish: when not an adoption of the English surname, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Druaidh or Ó Druaidh or Ó Draoi ‘son’ and ‘descendant of the druid’, from draoi ‘druid’, genitive druadh or draoi. All of these were often Anglicized as Drury .

variants.name: Drews
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhard, Gunter, Hans, Heinz, Helmut, Otto, Reinhold, Bernd, Detlef, Egon, Erna.
English: variant of Drew with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also found in Guernsey in the Channel Islands.
Americanized form of German, Danish, and Dutch   Drewes  .

variants.name: Drewer
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Droart, Drouart (which is probably from ancient Germanic Droghard, with the first element as in Drew + hard ‘brave, hardy’).

variants.name: Drewett
meanings: English (Wiltshire, Berkshire, and Surrey): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Druet, a diminutive of Drue, Dreu (from ancient Germanic Drogo); see Drew 1. Alternatively, the name may be from a diminutive of Old French dru ‘lover’; see Drew 4.

variants.name: Dronet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Desire, Olympe.

French (mainly Loire-Atlantique): from a diminutive of the personal name Dron, derived from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ).

variants.name: Droz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Aida, Cruz Maria, Diego, Jose, Miguel, Milagros, Nydia, Osvaldo, Rodriguez, Vidal.

French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). This surname is also found in Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Drea
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny): shortened Anglicized form of Ó Draoi (see Drew ).

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: Drouin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Benoit, Jacques, Andre, Clermont, Emile, Gaston, Gilles, Ovide, Pierre, Serge.

French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Droue, a variant of Dreue, which is from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). Compare Derouen , Derouin , and Tron .

variants.name: Drury
meanings: Anglo-Norman: Druerie, courtship, gallantry, love

variants.name: Drouhard
meanings: French:
from the ancient Germanic personal name Droghard, composed of the elements drog (presumably meaning ‘battle’; see also Drew ) and hard ‘hard, strong’.
alternatively, a derivative of the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names like Droghard (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Lemuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly meaning ‘devoted to God’ in Hebrew; it was borne in the Bible by an obscure king who was lectured by his mother on the perils of strong drink and the virtues of a dutiful wife (Proverbs 31). He is mentioned by  Chaucer  in The Canterbury Tales, where his name is carefully distinguished from the more familiar   Samuel .  Lemuel Gulliver was the unusual name of the hero of  Jonathan Swift's  Gulliver's Travels (  1726 ).

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1775: Lincoln, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Lincoln, Massachusetts, United States 1790: Washington, Massachusetts, United States 1820, Washington, Maine, United States 1839: Aroostook, Maine, United States
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: The First Presidential Election
historicEvents.description: The First Presidential election was held in the newly created United States of America. Under the Articles of Confederation, the executive branch of the country was not set up for an individual to help lead the nation. So, under the United States Constitution they position was put in. Because of his prominent roles during the Revolutionary War, George Washington was voted in unanimously as the First President of the United States.

historicEvents.title: New Hampshire Helps Ratify the US Constitution
historicEvents.description: On June 21, 1788, New Hampshire became the ninth and final state needed to ratify the US Constitution and make it the official law of the land

historicEvents.title: Concord Becomes the Capital
historicEvents.description: In 1808, Concord became the capital of New Hampshire. It was originally the Penacook Plantation given to the state by the Massachusetts Bay Colony.

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.
Historical Boundaries: 1839: Aroostock, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Lemuel Drew was born in 1769, in Limington, York, Maine, United States, his father, Samuel Drew, was 31 and his mother, Lovey Bunker, was 31. He married Nancy Chadwell on 21 August 1798, in Limerick, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 4 September 1840, in New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United States, at the age of 71, and was buried in New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lemuel Drew est né en 1769, à Limington, York, Maine, États-Unis, son père, Samuel Drew, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lovey Bunker, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Nancy Chadwell le 21 août 1798, à Limerick, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 4 septembre 1840, à New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lemuel Drew 1769 in Limington, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Drew 31 und seine Mutter Lovey Bunker 31. Er hat am 21. August 1798 in Limerick, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Nancy Chadwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 4. September 1840 im Alter von 71 Jahren in New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lemuel Drew è nato il nel 1769 nel Limington, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Samuel Drew, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lovey Bunker, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Nancy Chadwell il 21 agosto 1798, nel Limerick, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 4 settembre 1840, nel New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lemuel Drewが1769年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークリミントンで生まれた時，父Samuel Drewは31歳，母Lovey Bunkerは31歳であった。1798年8月21日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークリメリックでNancy Chadwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1840年9月4日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクニュー リメリックで71歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクニュー リメリックにて埋葬された。

ko.New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine: 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 뉴 라임릭
ko.New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United S: 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 뉴 라임릭
ko.New Limerick, Aroostook, ME: 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 뉴 라임릭
ko.lifeSummary: Lemuel Drew(이)가 1769년 미국 메인 주 요르크 림잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Drew(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lovey Bunker(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1798년 8월 21일 미국 메인 주 요르크 라임릭에서 Nancy Chadwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1840년 9월 4일 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 뉴 라임릭에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 뉴 라임릭에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lemuel Drew nasceu em 1769, em Limington, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Samuel Drew, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lovey Bunker, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Nancy Chadwell em 21 de agosto de 1798, em Limerick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1840, em New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lemuel Drew родился в 1769 г. в местности лимингтон, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Samuel Drew было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lovey Bunker, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Nancy Chadwell 21 августа 1798 г. в местности лимирикк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 4 сентября 1840 г. в местности ню лимирикк, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности ню лимирикк, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lemuel Drew nació en 1769, en Limington, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, su papá, Samuel Drew, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lovey Bunker, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Nancy Chadwell el 21 de agosto de 1798, en Limerick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1840, en New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos.
